message:
perf(runtime): update three_lane test code for parking_lot RwLock API

Remove .expect("lock poisoned"), .expect("cx_inner lock poisoned"),
and .unwrap() calls from three_lane scheduler tests, using parking_lot's
direct .write()/.read() API consistently. Covers cancel_requested setup,
cancel_acknowledged setup, and ack verification assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
